ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaign_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution record */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the committee making the contribution */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the candidate receiving the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "contribution_source" TEXT /* Source of the contribution (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "contribution_amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the contribution (e.g., one-time, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "contribution_cycle" TEXT /* Cycle of the contribution (e.g., 2022-2024, 2024-2026) */,
  "contribution_type_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the type of contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., National, State) */,
  "committee_address" TEXT /* Address of the committee */,
  "committee_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the committee */,
  "committee_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the committee was registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "candidate_position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for (e.g., Senate, House) */,
  "candidate_party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_state" TEXT /* State the candidate is running from */,
  "candidate_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle */,
  "cycle_start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the cycle */,
  "cycle_end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the cycle */,
  "cycle_description" TEXT /* Description of the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each contribution record
Unique identifier for the committee making the contribution
Unique identifier for the candidate receiving the contribution
Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected)
Source of the contribution (e.g., individual, organization)
Frequency of the contribution (e.g., one-time, monthly, quarterly)
Standardized code for the type of contribution
Position the candidate is running for (e.g., Senate, House)
State the candidate is running from
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer)
Password for the user (hashed and salted)
